return_url.description: Return URL to redirect after onboarding is completed. `onboarding_status`, `product_type` and `account_id` will be returned as query string parameters

terms_of_service.description: Terms of service to display during onboarding which must be accepted by the end user
terms_of_service.example: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Proin sit amet massa nec leo euismod.

representative_is_ultimate_beneficial_ow.description: Automatically assign the business representative as the ultimate beneficial owner. This will hide the ultimate beneficial owner step

content.description: Base64 data URI of the logo image

width.description: Width in pixels of the logo image

height.description: Height in pixels of the logo image
